site.title: Dr. Lokeswara Rao Pelluru | Cardiothoracic & Vascular Surgeon

hero.name:
Dr. Lokeswara
Rao Pelluru
hero.meta: MBBS, DNB (CTVS) · 12+ Years Experience · KIMS Hospital, Nellore

about.heading:
Committed to
Advanced Cardiac Care
paragraphs: Dr. Lokeswara Rao Pelluru is a highly skilled Cardiothoracic and Vascular Surgeon with over 12 years of experience in performing complex heart, lung, and vascular procedures. Currently serving as a Consultant CTVS Surgeon at KIMS Hospital, Nellore.

He has previously worked with reputed institutions including Medicover Hospital, Nellore, and Apollo Hospital, Chennai. Dr. Pelluru combines advanced surgical techniques with a strong focus on patient safety, faster recovery, and long-term health outcomes.
about.image_alt: Dr. Lokeswara Rao Pelluru – Cardiothoracic Surgeon

qualifications.institution: Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences (2012)

expertise.heading: Specialized Surgical Expertise
expertise.subtext: Delivering precision in the most complex cardiac, thoracic, and vascular procedures.

cards.title: Coronary Artery Bypass
cards.desc: Off-Pump CABG surgeries with 200+ successful outcomes and minimal complications.

cards.title: Minimally Invasive Surgery
cards.desc: Advanced minimally invasive cardiac and valve surgeries with faster recovery times.

cards.title: Thoracic Surgeries
cards.desc: Lobectomy, Decortication, Lung Trauma, VATS, and Thymectomy procedures.

cards.title: Vascular Surgeries
cards.desc: Bypass, Thrombectomy, A-V Fistulas, and Varicose Vein procedures with 100+ cases.

cards.title: Valve Repair & Replacement
cards.desc: Aortic and Pulmonary valve repair and replacement surgeries with excellent outcomes.

cards.title: Adult Congenital Heart
cards.desc: ASD, VSD, PDA closures and complex adult congenital heart condition surgeries.

cards.title: VATS
cards.desc: Video-Assisted Thoracoscopic Surgery for precision thoracic procedures.

cards.title: Cardiac Tumor Surgery
cards.desc: Expert surgical management of cardiac tumors requiring complex resection techniques.

cards.title: Chest Trauma
cards.desc: Emergency and elective management of complex chest trauma and injuries.

timeline.desc: Currently leading the CTVS department, performing complex cardiac, thoracic, and vascular surgeries with exceptional outcomes.
Managed a wide spectrum of cardiothoracic surgeries, built the CTVS program, and mentored surgical teams.
Trained under eminent surgeons at India's premier cardiac facility, gaining expertise in complex cardiac procedures.

achievements.heading: Milestones & Recognition
bullets: Extensive experience in minimally invasive cardiac techniques
Actively involved in research and medical publications
Registered with Andhra Pradesh Medical Council (#75048)

procedures.heading: Specialized Treatments & Procedures
procedures.subtext: A comprehensive range of cardiac, thoracic, and vascular interventions delivered with surgical precision.

points.text: Proven success in complex cardiac surgeries

community.heading: Medical Camps & Community Initiatives
community.description: Dr. Pelluru actively participates in community healthcare initiatives aimed at improving access to quality medical care beyond hospital walls.

items.title: Free Cardiac Health Camps
items.desc: Conducted free cardiac and general health check-up camps for underserved communities.

items.title: Heart Health Awareness Programs
items.desc: Organized awareness programs on heart health, lifestyle diseases, and preventive care.

items.title: Rural & Underserved Communities
items.desc: Collaborated with healthcare teams to support rural communities and promote early screening.

network.heading: Professional Network & Collaborations
network.description: Dr. Pelluru maintains strong connections with leading specialists across India, ensuring the best possible coordinated care for every patient.

gallery.heading: Professional Journey
gallery.subtext: A glimpse into Dr. Pelluru's clinical practice, community outreach, and professional milestones.

philosophy.quote: My goal is to ensure accurate diagnosis, effective treatment, and improved quality of life for every patient — combining advanced surgical expertise with empathy and clear communication.
philosophy.author: Dr. Lokeswara Rao Pelluru
